name: Market Scope
when_to_use: Decide whether market sizing/growth/structure is in scope at this stage.

name: Customer Scope
when_to_use: Decide whether customer pain/JTBD work is in scope.

name: Competitive Scope
when_to_use: Decide whether direct/substitute/do-nothing mapping is in scope.

name: Domain Scope
when_to_use: Decide whether domain glossary/workflow/actor work is in scope.

name: Technical Scope
when_to_use: Decide whether feasibility/architecture/build-vs-buy is in scope.

name: Data Scope
when_to_use: Decide whether data inventory/access/quality is in scope.

name: Operational Scope
when_to_use: Decide whether delivery/support/staffing work is in scope.

name: Financial Scope
when_to_use: Decide whether unit-economics modeling is in scope.

name: Legal Scope
when_to_use: Decide whether legal/compliance/IP/privacy inventory is in scope.

name: Channel Scope
when_to_use: Decide whether channel discovery/economics work is in scope.

name: GTM Scope
when_to_use: Decide whether positioning/messaging/launch work is in scope.

name: Stakeholder Scope
when_to_use: Decide whether buyer/user/approver mapping is in scope (B2B / enterprise).

name: Risk Scope
when_to_use: Decide whether the risk register / kill-criteria work is in scope.

name: Trend Scope
when_to_use: Decide whether trend / horizon / timing work is in scope.

name: All Areas (Stage-Aware)
when_to_use: Recommend the first-pass subset based on stage (pre-idea / idea / build / launch / scale).
